Summing up on pricing that, “We heard several comparisons of this year’s pricing to 2021/2022 levels, which is still widely viewed as adequate and a far cry from the low point of 2017.” Terms and conditions are seen as “mostly holding”, albeit with some concessions that improve coverage for reinsurance buyers. KBW’s analysts said, “Most reinsurers appear far more willing to accept lower pricing than to yield changes on the much improved T&C changes that were achieved at the 1/1/2023 onset of the recent hardening cycle.” But, the analysts cite a “gamut of minor T&C changes”, such: as minimum premium true-ups to exposure now being allowed to float down and up; Florida reinsurance premiums now being paid quarterly instead of upfront; broadening of retrocession covers to named natural perils, from named specific perils (this is one to watch if events happen); aggregates, cascading covers, and top and drops now being more widely available; plus some modest extension of hours clauses and radius definitions (again, ones to watch when events occur).

NOAA’s outlook for the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season, which runs June 1 to November 30, predicts a 35% chance of a near-normal season, a 10% chance of an above-normal season and a 55% chance of a below-normal season. title: High-Powered Dads Are Spending Less Time at Work, More on Childcare
title_original: High-Powered Dads Are Spending Less Time at Work, More on Childcare
summary: Between the three-year period ending in 2019 and the three-year period ending in 2024, college-educated dads boosted time spent on housework and childcare by more than four hours per week, while reducing paid work by six hours, according to new research . title: NY State Construction Deaths Down 25% in 2024: Report
title_original: NY State Construction Deaths Down 25% in 2024: Report
summary: New York construction deaths fell considerably in 2024, when 55 workers died on job sites across the state, down from the year before, when 74 deaths were recorded, according to the New York Committee for Occupational Safety and Health (NYCOSH) annual construction fatality report. Analysis of the OSHA’s 31 New York State-based construction fatality investigations in 2024 found that in New York State, 81% of the construction workers who died were non-union.

summary: Federato doesn’t just sit alongside outdated legacy platforms; it becomes the new core, driving better business outcomes across every function.” The post Federato Appoints Yogesh Sapre as Chief Revenue Officer to Support AI-Native Insurance Growth appeared first on Insurtech Insights . Federato, an AI-native platform focused on transforming insurance operations, has appointed Yogesh Sapre as its new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) as the company continues to expand following its recent funding round and international growth initiatives. Sapre brings more than 25 years of experience in property and casualty insurance core systems and joins Federato as insurers increasingly explore AI-native platforms to modernise core operations.
why_matters: Los cambios de liderazgo suelen anticipar cambios estratégicos.

title: Columbia Lloyds Deploys ZestyAI Platform to Strengthen Underwriting in Severe Weather Markets
title_original: Columbia Lloyds Deploys ZestyAI Platform to Strengthen Underwriting in Severe Weather Markets
summary: The post Columbia Lloyds Deploys ZestyAI Platform to Strengthen Underwriting in Severe Weather Markets appeared first on Insurtech Insights . Columbia Lloyds Insurance Company has selected ZestyAI’s Risk and Decision Intelligence platform as the regional insurer looks to strengthen underwriting accuracy, portfolio management and property risk visibility across its homeowners business in Texas, Oklahoma and Arkansas. “Columbia Lloyds is taking a disciplined approach to how they underwrite, price, and manage exposure, and we’re proud to support how they’re shaping a more resilient book across Texas, Oklahoma, and Arkansas.” According to ZestyAI, its models are designed with transparency, validation and regulatory compliance in mind, supporting insurers in underwriting, exposure management and loss mitigation across weather-related and non-weather risks.
why_matters: Puede requerir adaptación regulatoria en los próximos meses.

title: Gallagher acquires McKee Risk Management
title_original: Gallagher acquires McKee Risk Management
summary: wholesale brokerage, binding authority, and programs division, Risk Placement Services , acquired Pennsylvania-based McKee Risk Management. Founded in King of Prussia, McKee Risk Management operates as a program administrator offering underwriting, policy administration, claims coordination, and risk management services. “McKee Risk Management brings a well-established platform and underwriting expertise that complement RPS’s programs offerings.” – J.
why_matters: Consolida el mercado y puede redefinir la competencia en el sector.

title: Acrisure announces layoffs
title_original: Acrisure announces layoffs
summary: In a letter announcing the layoffs, Acrisure cites advances in technology, AI and digital platforms as reasons for the layoffs. Acrisure is laying off 11% of its workforce, or about 2,250 employees, according to reports. The layoffs will begin this week and continue through 2027.
